title: Incident Management
summary: The process to restore normal service operation as quickly as possible and minimize business impact.

explanations.beginner: When a computer system breaks or stops working, Incident Management is the emergency response. Fix it fast so people can get back to work.
explanations.professional: Incident Management follows a strict ITIL lifecycle: Identification -> Logging -> Categorization -> Prioritization -> Diagnosis -> Escalation -> Resolution -> Closure. Prioritization is based on Business Impact and Urgency.
explanations.recruiter: Kumar Nikhil owns end-to-end Incident Management. He regularly handles detection, logging in ServiceNow, prioritization, scaling to specialized teams, and validating resolution while strict SLA and OLA thresholds are monitored.
